title: A Single-cell Atlas of Juvenile Nasopharyngeal Angiofibroma Reveals VEGF-Driven Angiogenic Remodeling as a Therapeutic Vulnerability.
publicationName: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences
journalName: medRxiv : the preprint server for health sciences
snippet: Juvenile nasopharyngeal angiofibroma (JNA) is a rare locally aggressive vascular sinonasal tumor that primarily affects adolescent males. Despite advances in endoscopic surgery and preoperative embolization, JNA can be associated with major operative bleeding risk and clinically meaningful recurrence, while non-surgical treatment options remain limited. title: Paridis rhizoma total saponins ameliorate abnormal uterine bleeding via regulating Proteus mirabilis 2024-mediated estrogen metabolism in the gut-reproductive axis.
publicationName: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
journalName: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
snippet: Abnormal uterine bleeding (AUB) is a highly prevalent gynecological disorder worldwide, for which first-line steroid hormone therapy is limited by well-documented adverse effects.
